adventure.title: Old Necropolis Retreat
adventure.description: A branching pursuit scenario in which the party collides with a withdrawing hostile patrol, chooses whether to press, investigate, or regroup, and risks running into reinforcements or uncovering useful intelligence.
adventure.author: Bill Eastman

npcs.name: Ilya
npcs.description: A sharp-voiced patrol survivor trying to preserve the remnants of her unit under pressure.

statBlock.summary: Mobile skirmisher leader with whistle signal, short blade, and tactical withdrawal instincts.
traits: Bonus action disengage once per scene

npcs.notes: Called Verrin's name before ordering the retreat.

npcs.name: Verrin
npcs.description: A brutal, heavy-set patrol enforcer whose death triggered the retreat.

traits: Advantage on saves vs fear while conscious

npcs.notes: Intended to begin the adventure already dead or dying by the time the GM starts active tracking.

npcs.name: Sable
npcs.description: A disciplined rear guard shooter using darkness and rubble for cover.

traits: Can hide in dim light as an action

npcs.notes: May flee or be isolated depending on pursuit choices.

npcs.name: Dren
npcs.description: A cautious advance scout moving ahead of the reinforcement element.

traits: May disengage and relocate without provoking once per scene

npcs.notes: Useful for testing chase, interrogation, or escape branches.

npcs.name: Serit
npcs.description: A hard, efficient veteran tasked with stabilizing the retreat and preventing pursuit.

statBlock.summary: Veteran commander with shield and disciplined squad tactics.
traits: Allied patrol members gain +1 AC while adjacent
Will negotiate only to buy time

npcs.notes: Can anchor combat, parley, or controlled withdrawal scenes.

scenes.name: Collapsed Chamber Skirmish
scenes.summary: The party catches the surviving patrol in the middle of a fighting withdrawal over a rubble berm.
scenes.gmDescription: Opening action scene. The patrol is already disengaging after Verrin falls. The real choice is whether the party presses, pauses, or attempts to exploit the confusion.
scenes.readAloud: Dust drifts in the thin light as shadowed figures scramble backward over the rubble berm. One of them shouts a dead man's name, then barks a retreat order as a whistle signal cuts through the chamber.
scenes.atmosphere: Confused violence, dim visibility, immediate tactical urgency.
objectives: Choose whether to pursue, search, or regroup
complications: Dim light gives ranged attackers trouble
clues: The patrol is executing a practiced fallback rather than routing blindly
A whistle signal confirms nearby support
Verrin was important enough for Ilya to call out his name in the chaos
failureStates: The patrol escapes cleanly and sets up a stronger defense
The party advances recklessly into reinforcements
successStates: The party pressures the retreat and may isolate survivors
The party secures immediate evidence from the chamber
rewards: Chance to seize equipment from the fallen

sceneNpcRefs.notes: Attempts to withdraw rather than hold ground.
Dead or dying by the time active tracking begins.

exitOptions.label: Pursue the retreating patrol
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose immediate pursuit with no pause.
exitOptions.resultText: The party surges over the broken stone before the enemy can fully reset.

exitOptions.label: Search the chamber first
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose caution over immediate pursuit.
exitOptions.resultText: The party pauses among rubble and bodies to gather what they can before moving.

exitOptions.label: Hold position and assess
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose to regroup rather than commit immediately.
exitOptions.resultText: The chamber falls into tense stillness as the party listens for movement deeper in the dark.

scenes.name: Aftermath Search
scenes.summary: The party inspects the battlefield and fallen patrol elements before deciding whether to press onward.
scenes.gmDescription: A clue-and-loot scene that rewards caution but costs momentum. Good for testing note entry, discovered clues, and multiple exits.
scenes.readAloud: With the sounds of retreat fading into deeper stone, the chamber resolves into wreckage: blood on broken masonry, a dropped bolt case, a snapped strap, and the dead weight of what the enemy chose not to carry.
scenes.atmosphere: A lull after violence, tense and forensic.
entryConditions: Reached by delaying pursuit after the opening skirmish
objectives: Decide whether to continue pursuit or prepare for contact
complications: Time spent here increases reinforcement risk
Some evidence is ambiguous without interpretation
clues: The patrol expected to regroup at a prepared fallback point
The whistle code suggests more than one surviving element
One mark on a stone edge may indicate a route used repeatedly
failureStates: The party lingers too long and is approached by reinforcements at a disadvantage
successStates: The party finds intel about fallback positioning
The party secures minor loot or tactical advantage

exitOptions.label: Track the patrol to the fallback position
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose to press on using gathered clues.
exitOptions.resultText: Following scrape marks and scattered debris, the party pushes deeper toward the enemy's next stand.

exitOptions.label: Prepare an ambush position and wait
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose to let the next enemy move into your space.
exitOptions.resultText: The party settles into cover and waits for the response element to come to them.
stateChanges: Mark party braced for incoming contact

exitOptions.label: Secure the chamber and stop here for now
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose to end the active push and regroup.
exitOptions.resultText: The party consolidates control of the chamber and delays further movement.
stateChanges: Mark chamber as temporary safe hold

scenes.name: Tactical Pause
scenes.summary: The party regroups, listens, and decides whether to advance, fortify, or disengage temporarily.
scenes.gmDescription: A pacing scene that provides a natural table pause and tests session-safe transitions.
scenes.readAloud: Beyond the berm, the darkness swallows the last scrape of boots. For a heartbeat the chamber holds its breath, broken only by settling dust and the faint memory of the whistle's echo.
entryConditions: Reached by choosing not to pursue immediately
complications: The enemy is repositioning somewhere ahead
Every moment of delay changes the next engagement
clues: Movement deeper in the passage is organized, not chaotic
The patrol expected the terrain ahead to work in their favor
failureStates: The party yields too much initiative
successStates: The party makes a deliberate, informed next move

exitOptions.label: Advance carefully toward the fallback route
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose a cautious advance.
exitOptions.resultText: Weapons raised, the party moves into the dark after the retreating survivors.

exitOptions.label: Hold and receive the next contact
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose to let the next move come to you.
exitOptions.resultText: The party settles into defensible positions and waits.

exitOptions.label: Regroup here and end the session
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose to stop before committing deeper.
exitOptions.resultText: The party withdraws just enough to secure a temporary halt point.

scenes.name: Fallback Berm
scenes.summary: The pursuing party reaches the enemy's prepared fallback position before or just as it stabilizes.
scenes.gmDescription: This is the central pressure scene. It can become a sharp combat exchange, a broken retreat, or a transition into reinforcement contact.
scenes.readAloud: The passage opens onto a broken ridge of stone and shattered masonry where the retreating patrol has already begun to turn. Crossbow lines angle through gaps in the rubble, and somewhere ahead a harsher voice starts issuing orders.
scenes.atmosphere: Compressed violence, prepared defense, rising risk.
entryConditions: Reached by pursuing or advancing from the opening area
objectives: Avoid being fixed in place for reinforcements
complications: The enemy has better cover here
clues: The fallback site was chosen in advance
Someone more disciplined than Ilya may be coordinating the next response
failureStates: The party is pinned until reinforcements arrive
successStates: A hostile is isolated for capture or questioning

exitOptions.label: Take a survivor alive
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose if the party subdues or corners an enemy.
exitOptions.resultText: With one foe cut off and the line broken, the party has a brief chance to force answers.

exitOptions.label: Push forward before reinforcements fully deploy
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose to continue aggressive pressure.
exitOptions.resultText: The fight spills forward just as the next enemy element closes in.

exitOptions.label: Secure the fallback line and stop here
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose consolidation over immediate escalation.
exitOptions.resultText: The party takes control of the rubble line and uses the breathing room to regroup.

scenes.name: Reinforcement Contact
scenes.summary: The next enemy element arrives under Sergeant Serit, creating a tense window for parley, bluff, delay, or renewed violence.
scenes.gmDescription: This scene is intentionally flexible: social pressure, threat exchange, bluffing, or transition back into combat. It helps test non-combat branching and summary generation.
scenes.readAloud: Bootsteps echo from the dark ahead in disciplined cadence. A shielded figure emerges just far enough to be seen, spear low, voice level. 'Enough. Step back from my people and tell me why I should not close this passage with your bodies.'
scenes.atmosphere: Controlled threat, military discipline, knife-edge negotiation.
entryConditions: Reached when the enemy response element arrives or is awaited
objectives: Avoid fighting on the enemy's terms
complications: Serit may only be talking to buy time
The surviving patrol may regroup behind him
A failed parley can collapse instantly into violence
clues: Serit expected contact but not this level of disruption
The patrol's fallback structure is part of a larger defensive logic
The enemy is trying to contain information as much as territory
failureStates: The enemy gains time to reorganize
The standoff turns into an unfavorable fight
successStates: The party withdraws on favorable terms

sceneNpcRefs.notes: May circle or observe while Serit talks.

exitOptions.label: Exploit hesitation and isolate a prisoner
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose if parley or pressure produces a vulnerable target.
exitOptions.resultText: In the confusion of command and counter-command, one enemy is cut off long enough to seize.

exitOptions.label: Withdraw with what you have learned
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose to end the engagement without pressing deeper.
exitOptions.resultText: The party breaks contact in good order, carrying hard-won knowledge out of the dark.

exitOptions.label: Force the issue into a final clash
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose escalation over disengagement.
exitOptions.resultText: The standoff fails, and the struggle shifts toward revelation and decisive outcome.

scenes.name: Interrogation Window
scenes.location: Old Necropolis - Secured Corner or Captive Hold
scenes.summary: The party has a narrow opportunity to question a captured enemy before circumstances close in again.
scenes.gmDescription: Use this scene to test note capture, clue tracking, and lore update generation.
scenes.readAloud: Pinned in shadow and stone, the captive looks less defiant than cornered. Nearby echoes carry just enough movement to remind everyone that this moment will not last.
entryConditions: A survivor has been captured or isolated
complications: The captive may lie, stall, or give partial truths
Other enemies may still be maneuvering nearby
clues: The fallback was only the outer layer of a larger defensive plan
A deeper authority is controlling access through the area
Recent movement in the Necropolis is not random territorial behavior
failureStates: The questioning takes too long and costs position
successStates: The party leaves with actionable intelligence
The party identifies a new lore thread or faction lead

sceneNpcRefs.notes: Default captive for this scene, but may be replaced by another survivor in actual play.

exitOptions.label: End the push and regroup with the new information
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose to preserve gains and stop here.
exitOptions.resultText: The party withdraws to consolidate what they learned before the enemy can recover.

exitOptions.label: Press immediately toward the deeper command source
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose to convert intelligence into immediate action.
exitOptions.resultText: Armed with fresh answers, the party drives onward before the window closes.

scenes.name: Command Revelation
scenes.summary: The party reaches the point where the patrol's behavior starts to make strategic sense, revealing a broader pattern and setting up future consequences.
scenes.gmDescription: This is the capstone scene for the seed adventure. It does not need to resolve everything; it should generate a satisfying adventure summary and lore update summary.
scenes.readAloud: The passage beyond opens not into chaos, but order: a defended threshold, marked routes, evidence of repeated movement, and the unmistakable sense that the patrol was only the outer skin of something larger and carefully hidden.
scenes.atmosphere: Discovery, dread, strategic widening of scope.
entryConditions: Reached through successful pressure, interrogation, or deliberate escalation
objectives: Understand what the patrol was protecting
Choose whether to push further or end on the revelation
complications: The deeper force may still be out of reach
The party may not have the strength to continue immediately
clues: The Necropolis presence here is organized around controlled access, not random scavenging
Recent patrol behavior suggests larger strategic preparation
Someone with authority beyond the immediate patrol is shaping events
failureStates: The party recognizes the scale of the threat too late to capitalize on the discovery
successStates: The party exits with a major lore update and future hook
The adventure closes on a clear strategic reveal

sceneNpcRefs.notes: May appear directly or remain implied depending on prior outcomes.

exitOptions.label: Conclude the adventure on the revelation
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose to end with discovery and carry consequences forward.
exitOptions.resultText: The party withdraws with proof that the conflict is larger than the patrol itself.

exitOptions.label: End the session here and continue next time
exitOptions.conditionText: Choose to preserve the cliffhanger for the next session.
exitOptions.resultText: The party holds at the edge of a larger mystery, poised for the next descent.

scenes.name: Safe Pause - Chamber Secured
scenes.summary: A temporary safe endpoint after securing the opening chamber.
scenes.readAloud: For the moment, the chamber is yours. Dust settles. Weapons lower a fraction. Whatever comes next will come later.
entryConditions: Reached by choosing to stop after the chamber or search
successStates: Session ends in a stable location

exitOptions.label: Resume later from the secured chamber
exitOptions.conditionText: Administrative resume link for testing only.
exitOptions.resultText: On the next session, play can resume from the secured approach.

scenes.name: Safe Pause - Fallback Line Secured
scenes.summary: A temporary safe endpoint after controlling the fallback position or withdrawing in good order.
scenes.gmDescription: Utility node for session-end testing and resume behavior.
scenes.readAloud: The last echoes of violence fade across broken stone. For now, the line holds, and the dark beyond keeps its secrets until you choose to press again.
entryConditions: Reached by securing or withdrawing from the middle phase
successStates: Session ends in a stable mid-adventure state

exitOptions.label: Resume later from the secured fallback line
exitOptions.conditionText: Administrative resume link for testing only.
exitOptions.resultText: On the next session, the party resumes from its consolidated position.

scenes.name: Safe Pause - At the Threshold
scenes.summary: A cliffhanger endpoint at the edge of a larger discovery.
scenes.gmDescription: Utility node for end-of-session cliffhanger testing.
scenes.readAloud: You have seen enough to know this was never just a patrol action. The dark ahead waits, patient and prepared, for the next descent.
entryConditions: Reached by choosing to stop after the revelation
successStates: Session ends on a strong forward hook

exitOptions.label: Resume later from the threshold
exitOptions.conditionText: Administrative resume link for testing only.
exitOptions.resultText: On the next session, the party resumes at the edge of the deeper mystery.

scenes.name: Adventure Complete
scenes.summary: Administrative completion node marking the adventure as finished.
scenes.gmDescription: Use this node to test adventure-complete handling, summary generation, and lore export.
scenes.readAloud: You leave the dark behind with proof enough to change what comes next.
entryConditions: Reached when the adventure is concluded
